"use client"

export { SmartTextbox } from "@tigerabrodioss/fude"

export type {
  Segment,
  TextSegment,
  MentionSegment,
  MentionItem,

_meta.author: tigerabrodi
_meta.title: Smart Textbox
_meta.description: Rich text input with @mentions and AI autocomplete. Inline tag chips, ghost text suggestions. Keyboard-first, fully customizable.
